failed_attempts.sql:
WITH current_and_next_month AS (
 SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 month') - INTERVAL '1 day' AS this_month_start,
 MAX(p.published_at) OVER () AS current_end_of_month
 FROM publication p 
 WHERE (SELECT bool_or((TO_DATE(p.published_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= $1 AND TO_DATE(p.published_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < $2) OR (TO_DATE(p.published_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') <= $2))) = TRUE
 GROUP BY 1
 UNION ALL SELECT this_month_start + INTERVAL '1 day' AS this_month_start FROM current_and_next_month WHERE this_month_start >= CURRENT_DATE
 ), publications_to_post_this_month AS (
 SELECT publication_id FROM publication p JOIN current_and_next_month cm ON p.published_at > cm.this_month_start 
 )
 SELECT publication_id, p.description_lexemes 
 FROM (SELECT * FROM publications_to_post_this_month UNION ALL select p.publication_id from publication p join current_and_next_month cm on p.published_at <= cm.current_end_of_month) AS filtered_result
 JOIN publication p ON publication_id = p.id
 WHERE to_tsvector(p.description) @@ to_tsquery('english', 'new') GROUP BY publication_id ORDER BY ts_rank(p.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'new')) DESC LIMIT 10;
